name: apex-rollup
description: Fast, configurable, elastically scaling custom rollup solution. Apex Invocable action, one-liner Apex trigger/CMDT-driven logic, and scheduled Apex-ready.
author: james.simone

scripts.create:org: sf org create scratch --definition-file config/project-scratch-def.json --alias apex-rollup-scratch-org --set-default --duration-days 30 --wait 30 && npm run install:currency:data
scripts.create:local:org: npm run create:org && npm run install:nebula:logger
scripts.create:package:code-coverage: pwsh -Command "&{ . ./scripts/generatePackage.ps1; Generate -PackageName '"Apex Rollup - Extra Code Coverage"' -ReadmePath "./plugins/ExtraCodeCoverage/README.md" }"
scripts.lint:verify: npx @salesforce-ux/slds-linter@latest lint && sf code-analyzer run --rule-selector eslint:(1,2,3) --workspace rollup
scripts.scan: npm run lint:verify && npm run scan:pmd
scripts.scan:pmd: sf code-analyzer run -r pmd:(1,2,3) --workspace rollup/**/*.cls --workspace plugins --workspace extra-tests
scripts.test: npm run test:apex && npm run test:lwc
